# mtncloud_role (Resource)

Manages an MTN Cloud role. `permission_set` is a JSON document in the Morpheus role API shape (global access defaults plus per-feature/cloud/instance-type/task/blueprint/… permission lists); it is config-authoritative and not read back. Note: creating `account` (tenant) roles needs admin-accounts access, which the customer-admin token typically lacks.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# A user role with a permission set in the Morpheus role API shape.
resource "mtncloud_role" "operators" {
  name        = "operators"
  description = "Day-to-day operators"

  permission_set = jsonencode({
    globalSiteAccess         = "all"
    globalInstanceTypeAccess = "full"
    featurePermissions = [
      { code = "admin-users", access = "full" },
      { code = "infrastructure-network", access = "read" },
    ]
  })
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Name (authority) of the role.

### Optional

- `description` (String) Description of the role.
- `multitenant` (Boolean) Whether the role applies across all tenants (master-tenant roles).
- `multitenant_locked` (Boolean) Whether sub-tenants are prevented from modifying the role.
- `permission_set` (String) JSON document of role permissions in the Morpheus role API shape, e.g. `jsonencode({ globalSiteAccess = "all", featurePermissions = [{ code = "admin-users", access = "full" }] })`. Config-authoritative (not read back).
- `role_type` (String) Role type: `user`, `account` (default `user`). Changing it forces a new role.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Numeric identifier of the role.
